session.user:
Run the following checks and report results: 1. ruff check src/erk/cli/commands/consolidate_learn_plans_dispatch.py src/erk/cli/commands/one_shot_remote_dispatch.py 2. ruff format --check src/erk/cli/commands/consolidate_learn_plans_dispatch.py src/erk/cli/commands/one_shot_remote_dispatch.py 3. ty check src/erk/cli/commands/consolidate_learn_plans_dispatch.py src/erk/cli/commands/one_shot_remote_dispatch.py
Report the output of each command.
session.assistant: I'll run all three checks and report the results.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run ruff check on two dispatch command files

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Check if files need ruff formatting

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run type checking on two dispatch command files
